title: mespilodaphne phillyreoides
intro: Mespilodaphne phillyreoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Mespilodaphne phillyreoides are traditionally used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
